case_title: LIBERTY MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. AKANO NZEREM et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-08-2005 CONTINUED TO SEP-02-2005 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST, DEFENDANT (S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DOCUMENTS IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT NZEREM, AKANO
